name: BION ENVIRONMENTAL TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: Bion Environmental Technologies Inc. develops and sells its patented Ammonia Recovery System (ARS) and Gen3Tech platform for capturing and upcycling ammonia from livestock manure and other organic waste streams, producing organic fertilizers and enabling renewable natural gas (RNG) production.
sellsTo: livestock CAFOs and anaerobic digestion facilities
organic fertilizer distributors and agricultural customers

exposures.sentence: Bion’s technology captures and upcycles these polluting waste emissions and discharges to produce renewable energy, organic fertilizers, and/or low carbon fertilizers for corn used in the production of clean fuels.
We are now evaluating a number of these as potential development and finance partners for project opportunities.
Bion received an OMRI (Organic Materials Review Institute) Listing on its first commercial nitrogen fertilizer product, a 10-0-0 ammonium bicarbonate solution, in August 2024.

catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, Bion completed and released its Technology-Optimization Report, that details the development and 18-month optimization of the ARS at our demonstration facility in Fair Oaks, Indiana.

catalysts.event: OMRI Listing granted for 10-0-0 ammonium bicarbonate fertilizer
catalysts.sentence: Bion received an OMRI (Organic Materials Review Institute) Listing on its first commercial nitrogen fertilizer product, a 10-0-0 ammonium bicarbonate solution, in August 2024.
In May 2025, Bion secured its first non-binding offtake commitments for its AB10 nitrogen fertilizer.
